query:
SELECT sp.id, sp.alunoId, sp.competenciaId, sp.competenciaName, sp.progressoTotal, sp.aulasDisponiveis, sp.aulasConcluidas 
FROM student_performance sp 
WHERE sp.alunoId = 676283 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT sp.id, sp.alunoId, sp.competenciaId, sp.competenciaName, sp.progressoTotal, sp.aulasDisponiveis, sp.aulasConcluidas

LIMIT 20;
